title: Read-only query API / serving layer over the evidence card dataset (optional; dataset-first remains source of truth)
context: After the dataset is published (M4), a read-only query API may be built to make the evidence cards more accessible to programmatic consumers. This is optional and backlog: the dataset (versioned files + static rendering) is and remains the authoritative source of truth. The API must expose only the open-class card content, carry the 'not medical advice' notice in every response, and serve no patient-level data. It is not a clinical decision-support API.
objective: Build a read-only query API (REST or GraphQL) serving the evidence card dataset: query by target ID, gene symbol, cancer indication, or evidence type; return card JSON with provenance, grades, and the 'not medical advice' notice; serve no patient-level data and carry no treatment recommendations. The dataset files remain the authoritative source; the API is a read-through serving layer.
acceptanceCriteria: Read-only API implemented serving the evidence card dataset; no write endpoints; no patient-level data in any response
Every API response includes the 'not medical advice' notice and the card's source manifest version
API exposes only open-class card content (licence-class enforcement applied at the serving layer; no NC or controlled-access data served)
Query endpoints support at minimum: lookup by gene symbol/HGNC ID, by Ensembl ID, by cancer indication/ontology ID, and by evidence type
API documentation published; rate limiting and abuse-prevention controls in place
No secrets, API keys, or PII in logs or responses; dependency scanning in CI
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass with API package included
output: A merged PR adding a read-only query API serving the evidence card dataset with licence-class enforcement, 'not medical advice' notice, and no patient-level data — an optional serving layer over the authoritative dataset.
